Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}This is it, guys. We're finally gonna get to the bottom of all this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5028 0 0}Supposedly, it has to do with us and our Personas...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}You don't think that the only way out of this... is for us to die... do you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}We only got this far because we believed there'd be another way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 -1 0 0}Y-You're right... Sorry, I'm going back to my bad habits again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4140 0 0}We won't have to endure this for much longer. Everyone, brace yourselves. We're going in.[n]{f 1 1}
